Comment.MultiLanguageText: Kinematic-group view of per-axis velocity (from ScaraArm3D.AxesData.A[i].Velocity). Used by NX MCD via signal adapters.
Kinematic-group view of per-axis position (from ScaraArm3D.AxesData.A[i].Position). Used by NX MCD via signal adapters.

Phase C.0 (2026-05-17): direct mirror of J1_SCARA_Arm3D.ActualPosition (TO_Axis attribute). Exists for PLCSIM-Adv API monitoring (TO_Axis tags not exposed via API directly; HMI runtime uses TIA S7 driver which can read them). DIAGNOSTIC MIRROR — HMI continues to bind to J1_SCARA_Arm3D.ActualPosition direct.
Phase C.0 (2026-05-17): direct mirror of J1_SCARA_Arm3D.ActualVelocity. See J1_ActualPosition comment.
Phase C.0 (2026-05-17): direct mirror of J2_SCARA_Arm3D.ActualPosition. See J1_ActualPosition comment.
Phase C.0 (2026-05-17): direct mirror of J2_SCARA_Arm3D.ActualVelocity. See J1_ActualPosition comment.
Phase C.0 (2026-05-17): direct mirror of J3_SCARA_Arm3D.ActualPosition. See J1_ActualPosition comment.
Phase C.0 (2026-05-17): direct mirror of J3_SCARA_Arm3D.ActualVelocity. See J1_ActualPosition comment.
Phase C.0 (2026-05-17): direct mirror of J4_SCARA_Arm3D.ActualPosition. See J1_ActualPosition comment.
Phase C.0 (2026-05-17): direct mirror of J4_SCARA_Arm3D.ActualVelocity. See J1_ActualPosition comment.

Phase D.0 (2026-05-19): conveyor belt velocity command to MCD (PLC writes, MCD reads via sContainerBeltVel signal adapter on saContainerBe... owner). Unit: mm/s. Set by FB_ConveyorCtrl (future) or operator Watch Table for now. Default 0.0 (belt stopped).

Phase D.0 (2026-05-19): trigger to spawn a new container in MCD physics scene (PLC writes rising-edge pulse, MCD reads via sActivateSpawnContainer signal adapter on saContainerBe... owner). Each rising edge spawns one container at the source position. Used by FB_Palletizing test harness or operator override.

Phase D.0 (2026-05-19): trigger to remove container at LEFT sink position (PLC writes rising-edge pulse, MCD reads via sSinkContainer signal on saContainerPallet_1 OR _2 — operator picks which physical adapter corresponds to "left" at TIA mapping step). Rising edge removes one container. V3.0 cycle does not actively drive sinks; reserve for V3.1+ pallet-full cleanup logic.
V3.0 左侧托盘卸料指令

Phase D.0 (2026-05-19): trigger to remove container at RIGHT sink position (PLC writes rising-edge pulse, MCD reads via sSinkContainer signal on the other saContainerPallet_X). Operator's pairing decision at TIA mapping step. V3.0 cycle does not actively drive sinks; reserve for V3.1+.
V3.0 右侧托盘卸料指令

Phase D.0 (2026-05-19): container-reached-packing-position sensor (MCD writes via sContainerBeltPackingSensor signal adapter on saContainerBe... owner, PLC reads). TRUE when a container is detected at the packing station; used by FB_ConveyorCtrl (future) to advance the state machine to "container ready for ABCDE pick" or operator visual confirmation.

Phase D.0 (2026-05-19): container-reached-palletizing-position sensor (MCD writes via sContainerBeltPalletizingSensor signal adapter on saContainerBe... owner, PLC reads). TRUE when a container is detected at the palletizing station; used by FB_AutoCtrl_Palletizing (future) to gate the pick-and-place cycle on actual container arrival vs free-running cycle.

Phase D.2 (2026-05-19): belt mechanical stopper active state (MCD writes via sContainerBeltStopperSensor signal adapter on saContainerBelt_1 owner, PLC reads). TRUE = stopper is engaged (mechanically blocking belt flow); FALSE = released. Provides redundant arrival confirmation alongside PalletizingSensor, and diagnostic feedback if stopper sticks in either state. V3.0 cycle doesn't strictly require this (uses PalletizingSensor as pick gate), but operator can monitor it via Watch Table during smoke runs.
V3.0 输送带挡板传感器: TRUE=挡板已升起阻挡

Phase D.1 (2026-05-19): trigger to spawn a pre-completed/stacked container variant in MCD (PLC writes rising-edge pulse, MCD reads). Maps to NX Object Source `objsrcContainerComplete_1`. Unused in V3.0 base orchestration; reserve for V3.1+ recipe-driven box variants (e.g., different sizes, pre-stacked pallet demo).
V3.1+ 预堆码箱体触发指令

Phase D.1 (2026-05-19): trigger to remove container at conveyor end-of-line / generic sink position (PLC writes, MCD reads). Maps to NX Object Sink `objsinkContainer_1`. Distinct from SinkContainerLeft/Right which are pallet-specific. Unused in V3.0; reserve for V3.1+ conveyor cleanup (e.g., reject lane, end-of-line discard).
V3.1+ 输送带末端卸料指令

Phase D.1 (2026-05-19): sink-zone collision sensor (MCD writes via csContainerSink_1 collision-sensor signal, PLC reads). TRUE when a container is detected entering the sink zone. Reserve for V3.1+ confirm-removal feedback (FB verifies SCARA actually dropped the box rather than just commanding release).
V3.1+ 卸料区进入传感器

Grip-success feedback (2026-05-21): MCD writes via the sScaraHasGrippedObj output signal on the Suction_Cup_Gripper SignalAdapter (MCD writes, PLC reads). TRUE = the suction cup has successfully gripped a container; FALSE = nothing held. Lets the PLC confirm a real pick before the SCARA raises, and pins the grip chain for diagnostics.
吸盘抓取成功反馈: TRUE=已成功抓取箱体, FALSE=未抓取
